div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in China (MacMurray)
div.p: Sir: The Department has received your despatch No. 2372 of October 11, 1929,See footnote 97, p. 479. in regard to the occupation of American mission premises by Chinese troops.
The Department approves the instruction issued to the American Consulate at Tsinan by the Legation under date of October 9, 1929, a copy of which was enclosed with the despatch under acknowledgment.

The Department would be interested in receiving information regarding the results that may follow a direct appeal by American missionaries to the Minister for Foreign Affairs in cases of occupation of mission property by Chinese troops.
div.closer:
For the Secretary of State:
Nelson Trusler Johnson
